steps.t: The dwarves of the Orc-watch are fewer in number these days. Long-standing dwellers left in a fellowship seeking riches and adventure in the Redhorn L…
The dwarves of the Orc-watch are fewer in number these days. Long-standing dwellers left in a fellowship seeking riches and adventure in the Redhorn L…
The dwarves of the Orc-watch are fewer in number these days. Long-standing dwellers left in a fellowship seeking riches and adventure in the Redhorn L…
The road from Orc-watch to the Redhorn Lodes is in need of clearing, as quite a mess was left in the wake of the dwarf-fellowship.
A few members of the dwarf-fellowship have made camp at the bottom of the stairs toward the Redhorn. They chose not to abandon their goat and waggon.
The goat seems to have made a pile of... mess in a corner of the camp. This would be a good place to put the... mess from the road.
The dwarves of the camp will be more eager to talk to you now that you've rid yourself of the smell. But, first impressions are first impressions, and…
